title: ffi client delivers own broadcast messages to Dart
description: ffi/src/api/client.rs map_notification lines 244-249: DELIVER arm creates NieEvent::MessageReceived without checking if p.from == client.pub_id. The NieClient struct contains pub_id but it is not passed into map_notification. Every bridge handle_nie_deliver checks deliver.from == own_pub_id and skips (bridge-jmap:267, bridge-slack:128, bridge-teams:108). Fix: thread own_pub_id into map_notification (or the spawned task) and filter there.
